since_last: 60% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +6.46%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 60% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.05% · BTC +0.45% · Gold +1.80% · Nasdaq100 -1.09%. 60% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +6.46%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +6.46%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.23%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NOW is the standout at +10.14%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +10.14%, WDAY +9.43%, SNOW +8.86%, DDOG +8.85%, DV +8.64%. Laggards: NXPI -8.25%, TER -7.90%, QCOM -7.76%, VRT -6.75%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.00% at $153.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.00% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: DV moving on no clear catalyst
cards.body: DV is +8.64% with no fresh headline this cycle — attention without a story. Volume, not news, is doing the work.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
